description: Executes SQL queries, selects, inserts, or updates on PostgreSQL databases.

setupGuide.title: Connecting to PostgreSQL
setupGuide.summary: You need your Database Host, Port, Database Name, User, and Password.
steps: Obtain your database connection details from your hosting provider (e.g. Supabase, AWS RDS, DigitalOcean).
Ensure your database port (default 5432) allows connections from n8n!

outputs.label: Query Results
outputs.description: Rows returned by the SQL query
